name: marketcheck-cowork-plugin
description: Automotive market intelligence suite for dealers, dealer groups, appraisers, lenders, financial analysts, and manufacturers. 18 skills, 9 commands, 6 agents — powered by MarketCheck MCP server. Multi-agent architecture with paginated inventory scanning, parallel batch pricing, concurrent market analytics, and multi-location group orchestration. Segment-aware profiles with franchise/independent dual pricing and CPO-aware comparisons. Includes OEM investment signals, EV transition monitoring, dealer group health tracking, market momentum reporting, cross-location inventory balancing, and rooftop benchmarking. US + UK market support.
